title: GIS & Spatial
details: ArcGIS Pro / Online, QGIS, Mapbox / Web Mapping, GeoAI Applications — proficient in geoprocessing, spatial statistics, cartographic design, and web-based mapping.

title: Python Stack
details: GeoPandas, Pandas, NumPy, Rasterio, Shapely, GDAL, Matplotlib, EarthPy, Jupyter Notebooks — end-to-end spatial data workflows from ingestion through analysis and visualization.

title: Data & Analytics
details: Data visualization, machine learning (classification, ensemble methods), statistical analysis, and web dashboard development — turning raw data into clear, actionable outputs.

title: Web & Other
details: HTML / CSS / JavaScript, R / R Studio, prompt engineering, and technical communication — bridging spatial analysis with polished front-end delivery.
